title: Irons Spells 'n Spellbooks Restrictions
description: Learn every school of magic from Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks!
body:
# Please report bugs in my discord or codeberg, as I may not see messages otherwise
# Description!
_This is a pretty small mod I developed to fill a modding gap that I personally thought was missing, but I'm really excited to share it with you_

The goal of this mod is to provide users with a **non-intrusive way** to make spells less op in the early game of [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/project/s4OWxYQQ)

### Vision
Have you ever been playing a modpack, with [Iron's Spells n' Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/project/s4OWxYQQ) and think 
> **WOW! These spells are really powerful and beautiful! but they're kinda overpowered...**

Well this mod is for you! By restricting the spells in the same way Eldritch spells are restricted, it takes a lot longer to get the powerful spells, AND **modpack makers can remove the loot tables** so they can only be learned through the command **/learnSpell**

![example of an unlearnt spell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47c7043aa39120087404b073a46f13a4c32253b8.png)

I couldn't find a solution I liked, so I made one!

### Goals
- To offer users a **way to rebalance** the mod [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/project/s4OWxYQQ)
- To add compatibility with **select addons** that add other schools of magic
- To release a project I am proud of
- For **YOU** to play the game how **YOU** want to

### Key Features
- Make all spells require learning to use
- Requires players to have a certain rarity!
- Provide all **even modded** schools with their own manuscript to learn the spells
- Provide a cheaper manuscript to allow users to learn a **random spell**
- Allow imbued spells to be casted without learning them, **BUT** require learning to make
- Compat with any school addons
- **Resource pack makers** can give each manuscript their own **textures, and GUI textures**, [Example Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/4vUThz9R)

### Useful Information
- A specific spell can be learned by having a manuscript in one hand and the scroll in the other
- Rarity orbs let you upgrade your rarity level, these can be crafted with an alchemy cauldron of the rarity ink, and an upgrade orb
- A manuscript can be crafted by surrounding a spell focus item (the ones used to craft scrolls) with 4 torn scrolls
- Put any scroll in a crafting interface to provide 2 torn scrolls

### Specific Compat Support
- **[Fallen Gems & Affixes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fallen-gems-affixes)** (1.20.1) Cast Affixes do not require learning

### Languages
Currently supports
- **English**
- **Japanese**, Credit to Minedoll
- **Chinese**, Credit to [DrowningFish233](https://github.com/DrowningFish233)
- **Russian**, Credit to [DeGon137](https://github.com/Relimer/Irons-Restrictions/blob/1.20.1/src/main/resources/assets/irons_restrictions/DeGon137)
- **Norwegian** Credit to [Mariatto](https://x.com/MariaTakesTheW)
(I am so sorry it took so long to get this added mariatto)

If you would like to contribute to translations: 
- **make a pull request**
- **contact me on discord!**

### Permissions
_I_ give permission for anyone to use this mod, or source code how they see fit, as long as you **respect the restrictions and guidelines** of [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/project/s4OWxYQQ) since this wouldn't be possible without them! If you are unsure whether something is allowed **please just ask**- I promise I don't bite!

### Credits and Thank you!
**I would like to offer a huge thank you** to Iron, the creator of the base mod for creating such a great mod, and giving me permission to release this!

**I would also like to thank** the creators of Neoforge and Neogradle for providing us with this mod loader, and the MDKs which I used to make this mod.

**A big thank you** to [Kaupenjoe](https://www.youtube.com/@ModdingByKaupenjoe) for releasing his modding series which taught me modding when things got difficult.

**A thank you** to all the moderators and makers of modrinth for keeping this site safe and alive.

And finally: **thank you**, the reader for taking the time to read this and try out my mod.

### Advertisement
If you enjoy the mod, consider joining me on [Discord](https://discord.gg/bHjSxGb6Cc) or donating to me on [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/relimer)

![Consider joining me on discord, or supporting me on Ko-Fi!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8032a82341f5e86ca1339e7ea8e50573e2b62bea.png)

I'd love to see you there!
